summary: Status field says "Completed 2020" but narrative block p006_c0001 says the Busway on West 181st Street was completed in April 2021.
details: The corridor payload status is "Completed 2020" (from table row at p005_c0003). However, the narrative text at p006_c0001 states: "NYC DOT has completed three bus priority projects in the Bronx, including ... a Busway on West 181st Street in April 2021." The table may reflect the analysis year or a broader priority-corridor designation year, while the actual busway implementation was April 2021.
suggested_action: Review source to determine if "Completed 2020" in the table refers to corridor analysis/completion of planning or if the busway completion date of April 2021 should override.
